import_staff_step1: Idatha yakho ye-CSV kufuneka ibe kule fomati ingezantsi. Umgca wokuqala wefayile yakho ye-CSV kufuneka ube zihloko zekholamu njengoko kumzekelo wetafile. Kwakhona qiniseka ukuba ifayile yakho yi-UTF-8 ukunqanda iingxaki ezingeyomfuneko zokukhowudwa.
import_staff_step2: Ukuba ikholamu ozama ukuyingenisa ingomhla qinisekisa ukuba ifomathwe ngefomathi Ymd (2018-06-06).
import_student_step1: Idatha yakho ye-CSV kufuneka ibe kule fomati ingezantsi. Umgca wokuqala wefayile yakho ye-CSV kufuneka ube zihloko zekholamu njengoko kumzekelo wetafile. Kwakhona qiniseka ukuba ifayile yakho yi-UTF-8 ukunqanda iingxaki ezingeyomfuneko zokukhowudwa.
import_student_step2: Ukuba ikholamu ozama ukuyingenisa ingomhla qinisekisa ukuba ifomathwe ngefomathi Ymd (2018-06-06).
import_student_step3: Ukuphinda-phindwa kweNombolo yoKwamkelwa kwemiqolo (eyohlukileyo) ayizukuthathwa kumazwe angaphandle.
import_student_step4: KwiSini somfundi sebenzisa ixabiso leNduna, loMfazi.
import_student_step5: KwiQela leGazi lomfundi sebenzisa i-O+, A+, B+, AB+, O-, A-, B-, AB-xabiso.
import_student_step7: Kuba Ukuba uMgcini ngutata womsebenzisi, umama, elinye ixabiso.
import_student_step8: Igama lodidi livela kwenye itafile ngokokudidi, ngenisa i-Id yodidi (I-ID yodidi inokufunyanwa kwiphepha lodidi ).
import_student_step9: Indlu yomfundi isuka kwenye itafile ukuze yendlu yomfundi, faka i-Id yeNdlu yoMfundi (I-Id yeNdlu yoMfundi inokufumaneka kwiphepha lendlu yomfundi).
